characters.name: Big Blue and his older brother
characters.description: Big Blueand his unnamed older brother are two Spider-typeEnterrans. After capturingYakumo(who was ill at the time), Their threat of dropping her into the "Web of Destruction" enragedSagoandKutal. Leading the pair Hyper-Forming into their Hyper-Enterran Forms as Big Blue and his older brother assumed their own Hyper-Enterran form. The pair were soundly defeated and begged to be spared. Yakumo, Sago and Kutal agreed to let them go, though Mushra was reluctant. When they were all distracted, Big Blue's older brother betrayed him. Killing him to take the power of his brothersEncardfor his own. Despite the boost in power, Mushra easily dispatched the spider Enterran. He then slashed both brothers cards in half, killing the pair permanently.

characters.name: Binka
characters.description: BinkaGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanFamily(deceased)AnimeA New BeginningBinkais ahumangirl who first appeared in the altered timeline. After her parents died Binka was taken in byYakumo, whom she respects like a mother. Yakumo sends her out to bring back the threeEnterranswho makeupMushrambo(Mushra,Sago, andKutal). FindingMushraand the others, she keeps them on track on their journey though she is constantly bemused by their lack of resolve. Personality-wise she is the opposite of Yakumo where Binka is spunky, tomboyish, and short-tempered unlike the demure and gentle Yakumo, whom she loves like a mother nevertheless.
characters.personality_section: Personality-wise she is the opposite of Yakumo where Binka is spunky, tomboyish, and short-tempered unlike the demure and gentle Yakumo, whom she loves like a mother nevertheless.

characters.name: Bolt
characters.description: Boltis one of manyRobotsfrom Mechano City. He is the leader of a Robotic Rebellion againstKing Nipper, until learning the truth about him.

characters.name: Bonga
characters.description: Bongais a Water Buffalo-typeEnterran. Encountered on the plane toMechano City.

characters.name: Caterpillar Soldiers
characters.description: Caterpillar Soldiersare servants of KingDakuthat rode giant caterpillars. Shown in a flashback of the wars. Chasing down theHumansand brutally slaughtering a fleeing crowd of people.

characters.name: Celestial Guardians of Shinzo
characters.description: Celestial Guardian TheCelestial Guardiansare beings that are responsible for creatingMushraand sealingLanancurasinto a meteor. The Celestial Guardians are a group of higher plane beings that oversee the balance and stability of the Milky Way galaxy, swearing to never interfere with the affairs of the individual planets. They respresent life and light in the physical forms. As guardians they do not only exist in a single dimension, but in all dimensions and timelines, maintaining the balance. They exist within the realm of the cosmos, and are what the planets and creatures call Stars. The Guardians wear golden armor and a white toga; their weapons are also made of gold, infused with their power. They sport several golden wings on their backs, allowing them to fly in a planet's atmosphere. Though they have physical forms, they do not have specific identities, instead they all wear golden masks and are indistinguishable from each other. They all appear as males, but whether they are defined by gender is unknown. The Guardians were shown to be strict and followed a set system of rules, denying them from becoming involved in the affairs of the worlds. Although they have shown that these rules can be disregarded under certain circumstances, such as aiding Mushra when Lanancuras had grown too strong for the Celestial Enterran to beat.
characters.personality_section: The Guardians were shown to be strict and followed a set system of rules, denying them from becoming involved in the affairs of the worlds. characters.name: Celestial Mushra
characters.description: Celestial Mushrais a powerful form ofMushra, a Celestial Guardian of peace. He was originally one of theCelestial Guardians of Shinzo.

characters.description: Chipis a fat-lookingrobot. Chip is a friend ofBolt's in the Rebellion.

characters.description: Clipis a femalerobotfriend ofBolt's in the Rebellion.

characters.name: Crocodile Enterran Leader
characters.description: An unnamed crocodile-type Enterran who alongside other Crocodile Enterrans ambushedMushraandYakumo. After the other crocodile's were defeated, the Crocodile Leader Hyber-formed and fought Mushra. Carded by Hyper Mushra.

characters.name: Daigo (robot)
characters.description: Daigois arobotthat was created by and named afterDr. Daigo Tatsuro. It was used in the rebellion againstKing Nipper. Later it was used in battle against the BirdEnterransbyBolt's rebels with the help ofYakumo. Though it was eventually destroyed during the battle.

characters.name: Daku
characters.description:
Daku Dakuis the King of the InsectEnterransand one of theSeven Enterran Generals.
He resembles a Hercules Beetle-knight. He was eventually carded byMushra,Sago, andKutal. He was not so powerful as he thought himself to be and was defeated. Daku is able to assume a samurai-like Hyper Form.

characters.description: Darbais a Small horse-typeEnterran. He once dupedMushraand his friends into believing that he was a wizard of Shinzo.

characters.name: Diehanger
characters.description: Diehanger Diehangeris the King of the Wild Beast Enterrans and one of theSeven Enterran Generals. He resembled a smilodon with long yellow hair. Before the events of the series, Diehanger was carded and hisEncardwas seen in the possession ofRusephine.

characters.name: Doctor Parasite
characters.description: Doctor Parasiteis an Insectoid typeEnterranscientist who specializes in brainwashing techniques and servant ofDaku.

characters.name: Dr. Daigo Tatsuro
characters.description: Dr. Daigo Tatsurois a scientist andYakumo's father. He is the one that sent Yakumo to the future to save thehumanrace, he and several others createdEnterransin order to fight a strange disease that threatened to destroy humanity, it was a DNA virus, so they combined human DNA with animal's DNA. Lanancuraseventually turned the Enterras against the humans and robots, they fought great wars, then he was able to turnMushrambointo hating humans and ultimately with the help of the seven kings of Enterra destroyed each single one of them. Dr. Tatsuro tried to protect and hide the last hope of humanity, but Mushrambo could sense Yakumo and kill Dr. Tatsuro and when he was about to strike Yakumo, her powers divide his soul into three crystals. The Doctor knew that the crystal that Yakumo possessed would be able someday to restore peace. He once had an assistant inKing Nipperand created a giant robot namedDaigo(named after himself).

characters.name: Dr. Daigo Tatsuro
characters.description: Dr. Daigo Tatsurois a scientist andYakumo's father. characters.name: Eilis
characters.description: Eilisis the prideful and sadistic commander of theKadrianarmy, his body is made of quicksilver metal that allows him to alter his form. Eilis is also capable of covering large areas in quicksilver and altering any area of it as he desired.

characters.name: Eilis
characters.description: Eilisis the prideful and sadistic commander of theKadrianarmy, his body is made of quicksilver metal that allows him to alter his form. Eilis is also capable of covering large areas in quicksilver and altering any area of it as he desired.

characters.name: Evil Mushrambo
characters.description: Dark Mushrambo Evil Mushrambowas created whenLord Ryumatried to controlMushramboknowing that he was more powerful that any of the Kings (Generals) ofEnterra. This darker incarnation of Mushrambo was cold, did not speak. He obeyed Ryuma without question. However Mushrambo's love forYakumo Tatsurowas so strong that he soon stopped taking orders from Ryuma and fought and destroy him after he merged withGrandora, the love he felt for Yakumo and the blackEncardmade him so powerful and twisted that the only thing he wanted to do was destroy everything and everyone in his way of getting to Yakumo. Knowing that nobody would stand a chance against him, Yakumo took Ryuma's sword, having been told that the only way to stop this new evil Mushrambo was to kill him. Though that would also killMushra,SagoandKutal. At first she was determined to do it but she could not. So instead she used the power of her love to destroy the black Encard and revert Mushrambo back to normal.

characters.name: Evil Mushrambo
characters.description: Dark Mushrambo Evil Mushrambowas created whenLord Ryumatried to controlMushramboknowing that he was more powerful that any of the Kings (Generals) ofEnterra. characters.name: Franken
characters.description: Franken Frankenis the Queen of the SeaEnterrans(King of the Sea Enterrans in the English dub) and one of theSeven Enterran Generals. She was one of the seven Enterran generals that fought theHumansand ultimately destroyed almost all of them. Franken was later carded and herEncardwas seen in the possession ofRusephine. She later realized that she had not enough power to defeatMushra,SagoandKutal, so she absorbed the power of all six Enterran generals and obtainded a great power, though that was still nothing compared with the power of Gold Mushrambo.

characters.name: Gabriel
characters.description: Gabriel(Right) Rusephine(Left) Gabrielis one of the best looking backround characters in "Shinzo". He works forRusephineand has angel wings.

characters.name: Gabriel

characters.name: Garizani
characters.description: Garizaniis a Centipede/Lobster-likeKadrianandMushra's first opponent in the second timeline. He attacked the town that Mushra andBinkawere in. Before he was carded by Hyper Mushra, he shouted for his master to avenge him.

characters.name: Grandora
characters.description: Grandorais a three-headed Ice/Venom-Breathing dragon controlled by Reptile KingLord Ryuma. Grandora's three heads use different forms of ice when attacking, one creating a blizzard when roaring, one breathing a beam of ice, and the third spitting out ice chunks. Grandora is large and powerful. Ryuma and his servantUngrasummoned the beast after watchingGyasa's defeat at the hands ofMushrambo. The dragon rampaged throughout the city and foughtMushra,Sago, andKutalwhile Ryuma tookYakumoto his castle and tried forcing her to marry him. When the three Hyper-Enterrans began to fuse into Mushrambo, Ryuma tossed a black card into the mix and corrupted the fusion, creating Dark Mushrambo. When Dark Mushrambo stormed Ryuma's castle and began attacking,Ungrasummoned Grandora again. The dragon was slain by Dark Mushrambo, then hisEncardwas absorbed by Ryuma. Though despite his newly gained power, Ryuma was still no match for Dark Mushrambo.

characters.name: Granite Warriors
characters.description: TheGranite Warriorsare theKadriansrock soldiers, who were created byLanancuras.

characters.name: Gyasa
characters.description: Serpent princeGyasais a powerful reptile typeEnterranwhoMushraand crew encounter on their journey. Gyasa first made his presence known to the group by using a venomous bite from his snake like hair to turnYakumointo stone and plunges her into an acid lake, giving her Enterran protectors only a limited time to save her from dissolving. Gyasa starts off being outmatched by the three, but this soon changes as he grows stronger during the fight. He turnsKutalandSagointoEncardsbut before he can do so to Mushra, the fire Enterran uses his friends' cards to become Mushrambo.

characters.name: Hakuba
characters.description: HakubaGenderMaleSpeciesRobotFamilyNoneAnimeAwakening Hakubais a Celestial Equine that likeMushracame to Earth. Taking on arobotic-form, Hakuba served to protectYakumoand serve as her transport. During the battle withLanancuras, he absorbed theEncardsof the sevenEntarrangeneralsand reassumed his true form, theReversion Blade. The Reversion Blade later broke during battle when Lancuras' power was increased after absorbing Yakumo's lifeless body.

characters.name: Huntari
characters.description: Huntariis a Frilled lizard-typeEnterranand Bounty Hunter armed with an axe. He wanted to make a name for himself by capturingMushraand his friends. Eventually he was absorbed by a live plant and his seeds scattered upon the plant's destruction.

characters.name: Kadrian Foot Soldiers
characters.description: The foot soldiers of the Kadrians that work forLanancurasandLunaria.

characters.name: Katris
characters.description: Katrisis a Insect Bounty Hunter and Mantis-type Enterran. He was the one that capturedMushraandYakumoand had them hanging from the remains of the Statue of Liberty. When Mushra assumed his Hyper-Enterran form, Katris absorbed two insect cards to assume his Hyper-Enterran form.
